name: circuitshield
description: Post-audit invariant drift monitoring and audit gate for ZK circuits.

scripts.app:build: npm run build && npm run web:build
scripts.scan:example: tsx src/cli.ts scan examples --config examples/circuitshield.yml --format markdown
scripts.baseline:example: tsx src/cli.ts baseline create --ref audited-v1.0.0 --target examples --config examples/circuitshield.yml
scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/cli.js scan examples --config examples/circuitshield.yml --format json --out .tmp/scan.json && node dist/cli.js benchmark benchmarks --format json --out .tmp/benchmark.json && npm run web:build
